experimental_unit_note: Agreement is measured on temporal boundaries within videos; the subset is stratified for diversity of athletes, weight classes, outcomes, and difficulty.
selection_criteria: different weight classes / competition sessions (clip-id buckets as session proxy)
mix of successful (ok) and unsuccessful (fail) attempts
mix of easy (complete seven-phase, longer clear phases, 1080p) and difficult (truncated fails, short transition, 720p, atypical timing)
coverage of train / val / test athlete splits

videos.why_selected: Long successful women's superheavy attempt (11 s, 1080p) with a long catch; easy visual exemplar and distinct +86 kg session.
Clean men's -88 kg success with complete phases and generous catch/recovery; early clip-id session proxy.
Women's -53 kg successful lift; mid clip-id bucket; complete seven-phase structure.
Women's -86 kg success from a late clip-id session; diversifies competition-session proxy vs early IDs.
Lightest women's class in the subset; held-out test athlete; clear complete lift.
Women's -71 kg successful test-split attempt with complete phases.
Men's -71 kg long success (11 s); pairs with women's -71 kg (he) for class-matched sex diversity.
Successful -65 kg lift pairing with a failed -65 kg clip (adventino) to contrast outcome within class.
Known difficult athlete for learned models despite a successful lift; 720p; atypical timing/quality for boundary ambiguity.
720p men's -94 kg with incomplete supervised-phase coverage on an ok attempt; stresses ambiguous late-lift labelling.
Marked ok but only five supervised phases and a 2-frame transition; hard scoop boundary.
Failed attempt that still contains all seven supervised phases; unusual fail morphology.
Short 720p failed attempt with truncated phase set; early session proxy.
Shortest clip in the corpus (3 s) with a 2-frame transition; extreme temporal compression.
Failed -65 kg with 2-frame transition; difficult first-pull/scoop timing.
Late clip-id women's -86 kg fail with truncated phases; diversifies session proxy.
Val-split failed -65 kg counterpart to mosquera's success.
720p truncated fail; adds lower-resolution difficulty in the val split.
Filename weight-class spelling variant (-88k); truncated fail for session/label-robustness diversity.
Test-split truncated fail with -71k spelling variant; complements -71kg successes.

diversity_summary.resolutions_note: Includes multiple 1280x720 clips (abokhala, alipour, friedrich, moeini) amid predominantly 1920x1080.

notes: Do not compute agreement until annotator2 segment CSVs are complete for all 20 videos.
Competition identity is not an explicit metadata field; weight class + clip-id bucket are used as session proxies from Weightlifting House broadcast extractions.
